cases.input: We shipped a new checkout button color to 50% of traffic last week. Did it actually improve checkout completion?
Here are signup_completed=10000, profile_created=6500, first_action=2600. Where are users dropping off in onboarding?
Design the event taxonomy for our new subscription billing flow — we keep firing events called success and click with no structure.
Our KPI is checkout_completion_rate. What custom parameters and scope do we capture in code so it computes correctly in Amplitude?
Help us pick a North Star metric and supporting KPIs for a B2B collaboration tool; we have a dozen dashboards and no focus.
Compare month-1 and month-3 retention for our January vs February signup cohorts after we changed onboarding.
We need a live checkout-error tile that updates within 30 seconds at 2000 events per second, with an alert when errors spike.
Build a dashboard card showing 12 months of signups split by three plan tiers, refreshed hourly.
Baseline conversion is 5%, we want to detect a 0.2pp lift, but we only get 800 visitors a day. Can we run this A/B test?
We want to track add-to-cart properly across web and iOS so revenue lines up in our warehouse.
Report our activation rate KPI value for last quarter — but we never instrumented an activation event.
Overall checkout conversion went up but our mobile and desktop segments both went down this month. Explain the funnel.
